content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(6, 9, 0), (6, 7, 2), (0, 9, 5), (1, 2, 8), (6, 8, 8), (3, 6, 11), (5, 7, 11), (4, 8, 16), (2, 9, 18), (2, 7, 19), (1, 6, 20), (2, 4, 26), (4, 6, 27), (4, 5, 28), (0, 5, 29), (3, 7, 29)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 2 exactly at time 19.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 19:

* Edge (6, 8, 8) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 9, 18) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 7, 19) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 6, 20) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 4, 26) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 6, 27) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (4, 5, 28) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 5, 29) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 7, 29) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched are 8, 9, 7, 6, 4, 5, and 3.

Answer: [8, 9, 7, 6, 4, 5, 3]
